meta.title: a house at rest
meta.composer: field-tone for the Modern Mythology VN
meta.for: VN locale ambient bed · kitchens / apartments / bedrooms · the domestic hum under the Music Player
meta.notes: The sound of a lived-in room when no one is talking: the low drone of a refrigerator two walls away, a soft warm pad breathing slowly, and a faint appliance hum. Warm, not clinical. Sits WAY under the Music Player. 16 bars, 60 BPM.
